phrases.intent_en: Ask where to read earthquake plaque
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ler a placa do terramoto, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh shi en-KOHN-trah ah PLAH-kah doo te-rah-MO-too deh meel seh-TEH-sehn-toosh ee seeng-KWEN-tah ee SEEN-koo (Liaison: blend final unstressed vowels into the next word, e.g., en-KOHN-trah-ah)
phrases.cultural_note: A placa recorda o sismo de 1755, que devastou grande parte do Algarve, sendo um marco histórico comum em miradouros portugueses.

likely_response.local: Procure a placa do terramoto perto da torre sineira da Igreja de São Sebastião.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih AH PLAH-kuh DOO teh-ruh-MAW-too PEHR-too DUH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN seh-buhsh-TEEOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Look for the earthquake plaque near the bell tower of the Igreja de São Sebastião.

responses.english: Look for the earthquake plaque near the bell tower of the Igreja de São Sebastião.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih AH PLAH-kuh DOO teh-ruh-MAW-too PEHR-too DUH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH SOWN seh-buhsh-TEEOWN.
responses.local: Procure a placa do terramoto perto da torre sineira da Igreja de São Sebastião.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to read earthquake plaque
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a placa do terramoto de 1755?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-de POH-soo VEHR ah PLAH-kah doo teh-rah-MOH-too dee MEEL seh-teh-SEN-tooz-ee seen-KWEN-tah ee SEEN-koo
phrases.cultural_note: The 1755 Lisbon earthquake also severely affected the Algarve region. This plaque commemorates that event.

likely_response.local: A placa está no parapeito do miradouro, perto dos bancos de pedra.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH PLAH-kuh ehs-TAH NOO puh-ruh-PAY-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, PEHR-too DOOSH BAHNNG-koosh DIH PEHD-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: The plaque is on the viewpoint balustrade, near the stone benches.

responses.english: The plaque is on the viewpoint balustrade, near the stone benches.
responses.phonetic: AH PLAH-kuh ehs-TAH NOO puh-ruh-PAY-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, PEHR-too DOOSH BAHNNG-koosh DIH PEHD-ruh.
responses.local: A placa está no parapeito do miradouro, perto dos bancos de pedra.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bebidas perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR beh-BEE-duhsh PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao barista do café ou à Polícia de Turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW buh-REESH-tuh DOO kuh-FEH OHW AH poo-LEES-yuh DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the café barista or the Tourist Police.

responses.english: Ask the café barista or the Tourist Police.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW buh-REESH-tuh DOO kuh-FEH OHW AH poo-LEES-yuh DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao barista do café ou à Polícia de Turismo.
